Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}Are you okay? You don't look well...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}I hope it's not anemia... Should we get you to the nurse's office?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}Though, actually, that might be a bit hard for me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}I guess I'll just tell you. So, I took the exam for the medical school I was hoping to go to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}I guess this is my first real failure in life. Heheh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}So starting in the spring, I'll be a student-in-training. I'll have to keep studying hard every day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}I don't think I did badly, but exams tend to have a luck factor to them, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}I gave it a pretty good effort, I think. I just started studying too late in the game.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}The old me would've just given up. I don't exactly have the strongest willpower.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}But now it's a different story.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 14 0 0}I want to be a doctor and save as many lives as I can. I want to protect the people I love.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 15 0 0}There are a lot of different ways I can accomplish that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 16 0 0}And the way I want to do it is through the power of healing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 17 0 0}So from now on, I won't lose focus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 18 0 0}Next year, I'm going to try again, and I'll pass with flying colors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 20 0 0}I think it was because of your help that I've changed so much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 21 0 0}I'll be graduating a year earlier than you, but I won't forget about you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 23 0 0}When I'm a doctor, I'll give you free checkups, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 24 0 0}Until then, promise you'll look after your health.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 25 0 0}...You're not looking great now, to be honest. Just take care of yourself, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
